entry.title: Re: Bring the data from Azure DataBricks (ADB) to SAP ABA...
entry.content:
Yes, the accelerator code on the ABAP SDK is aimed at connecting to Azure services for pull based approaches. That was the first request on your list. Connection direction does not mean you cannot get the data. The SDK is pull-oriented but of course its code can be used for push-based too. You may connect to ADB REST api for instance and handle Managed Identities, Entra ID authentication flows etc out-of-the-box from ABAP.

Push based approaches require a completely different stack with transformations and coding your receiver on ABAP. And we haven't started discussing retry logic and mass data movement yet 😄 at that point a thread of comments is no longer suitable to arrive at a sustainable solution.

entry.title: SAP Payroll
entry.content:
Dear All,

I am having 6+ years in SAP payroll (End User) & I would like to learn & get certified from SAP for Payroll management.

Kindly guide which one certification would be the best for my payroll knowledge. Need your suggestion to improve my skills & ladder to my career.

Thanks.
HCM Payroll SAP SuccessFactors Learning

entry.title: Re: Creating Quality Notification via BAPI
entry.content:
Yes, I achieved my goal using the following function modules in sequence to create quality notifications and update catalog details:(create and modify FM need extra wait time)

  • BAPI_QNOTIFICAT_CREATE
  • BAPI_QUALNOT_MODIFY_DATA
  • BAPI_QUALNOT_SAVE
  • BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT

entry.title: About cloudready type when creating an adaptation project
entry.content:
Hi All, I'm expanding the standard 'manage purchase orders' app.

When creating an Adaptation Project, what is the application condition that the project type is cloudReady?

I want to create the Manage Purchase Orders application as an Adaptation Project, but it doesn't appear in the list because the type is not cloudready.

 

I originally thought that if the app type was sap s/4hana cloud, it was in a cloudready state. However, this app did not appear on the available list.

Is this app not actually working? Or is there something I need to configure?

 

Please help. thanks.

entry.title: Build your app (new UI)?
entry.content:
Build app new UI ?

@Dan_Wroblewski 
@MaiaraEllwanger 
@marihirvi 

also has this message on TOP 
"You have 2 free builds left in total. Android: 0, iOS: 0, Web and Workzone: 2"


building app not free anymore?

entry.title: "Executing a Batch Input Session --> Error: 'LEAVE TO TRANSACTION' is not allowed in Batch Input."
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have the following problem: I created a recording of my report using the SHDB transaction. Based on this, I created a report that, simply put, saves the corresponding records when changes are made (e.g., the description is changed), clicks the back button, and processes the next record that was entered in the selection screen.

Now, the report works quite well, but when the first record is processed and it moves to the next record by clicking the back button, I receive the error: "Error: 'LEAVE TO TRANSACTION' is not allowed in Batch Input." I have tried many things, but nothing has brought the desired success. My goal is to be able to run the report, which creates a batch input session, in the background. Unfortunately, this is currently failing.

Here is the code of my report:

REPORT z_autosave.

TABLES: /opl09/anl_sts, /opl09/fa_vorrat.

CONSTANTS: lc_transaction TYPE tstc-tcode VALUE '/OPL09/INVENTUR'.

DATA: BEGIN OF bdcdata OCCURS 1000.
        INCLUDE STRUCTURE bdcdata.
DATA: END OF bdcdata.
DATA: ls_bdcdata TYPE bdcdata.

SELECT-OPTIONS: s_melnr FOR /opl09/fa_vorrat-melnr,
                s_satza FOR /opl09/fa_vorrat-satza,
                s_datum FOR /opl09/fa_vorrat-datum,
                s_bukrs FOR /opl09/fa_vorrat-bukrs OBLIGATORY,
                s_anln1 FOR /opl09/fa_vorrat-anln1,
                s_anln2 FOR /opl09/fa_vorrat-anln2,
                s_icon FOR /opl09/fa_vorrat-icon OBLIGATORY DEFAULT '@09@',   "@08@ = green, @09@ = yellow, @0A@ = red
                s_frgsts FOR /opl09/anl_sts-frg_sts OBLIGATORY DEFAULT 'NRE'. "NRE = not relevant (for workflow)

PARAMETERS: p_group TYPE apqi-groupid DEFAULT 'OPAL_AUTO'.




START-OF-SELECTION.

  AUTHORITY-CHECK OBJECT 'F_BKPF_BUK'
    ID 'BUKRS' DUMMY "FIELD p_bukrs    <----- TO BE CHANGED LATER
    ID 'ACTVT' FIELD '01'.
  IF sy-subrc NE 0.
    MESSAGE e112(fg). "WITH p_bukrs.    <----- TO BE CHANGED LATER
  ENDIF.

  SELECT v~melnr, v~anln1, v~anln2 FROM /opl09/fa_vorrat AS v JOIN /opl09/anl_sts AS s
    ON v~melnr = s~melnr
    AND s~frg_step IS INITIAL
    AND s~frg_def IS INITIAL

    WHERE v~melnr IN @s_melnr
    AND v~satza IN @s_satza
    AND v~datum IN @s_datum
    AND v~bukrs IN @s_bukrs
    AND v~anln1 IN @s_anln1
    AND v~anln2 IN @s_anln2
    AND v~icon IN @s_icon
    AND s~frg_sts IN @s_frgsts

    INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_items).

  DATA: lv_count TYPE i VALUE 0.


** Öffnen der Arbeitsmappe
  CALL FUNCTION 'BDC_OPEN_GROUP'
    EXPORTING
      client = sy-mandt
      group  = p_group
      user   = sy-uname
      keep   = 'X'.

  LOOP AT lt_items ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs_item>).

    " Zähler erhöhen
    lv_count = lv_count + 1.

    "Choose Process work list on main screen
    PERFORM bdc_dynpro USING '/OPL09/FA_INVENTUR' '1000'.
    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'BDC_OKCODE'
                                     '=ARBVO'.

    " fill selection screen for process work list
    PERFORM bdc_dynpro USING '/OPL09/FA_ANLAGEN_ARBVOR' '1000'.
    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'S_MELNR-LOW'
                                     <fs_item>-melnr.      " Registration number
    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'BDC_OKCODE' '=ONLI'.

    " click on save
    PERFORM bdc_dynpro USING '/OPL09/FA_ANLAGEN_ARBVOR' '0100'.
*    PERFORM bdc_field  USING 'S_ANLN1' <fs_item>-anln1.
*    PERFORM bdc_field  USING 'S_ANLN2' <fs_item>-anln2.
    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'BDC_OKCODE' '=SAVE'.

    " confirm popup
    PERFORM bdc_dynpro USING 'SAPLSPO1' '0500'.
    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'BDC_OKCODE' '=YES'.
    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'BDC_SUBSCR'
                                     'SAPLSPO1                                0501SUBSCREEN'.

*    " Additional pop-up confirmations can be added here
*    " Example for another pop-up
*    PERFORM bdc_dynpro USING 'SAPLSPO1' '0500'.
*    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'BDC_OKCODE' '=YES'.

*    PERFORM bdc_dynpro USING '/OPL09/FA_ANLAGEN_ARBVOR' '0100'.
*    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'BDC_OKCODE'
*                                     '=/EBACK'.







    CALL FUNCTION 'BDC_INSERT'
      EXPORTING
        tcode     = lc_transaction
      TABLES
        dynprotab = bdcdata.

    CLEAR bdcdata[].

  ENDLOOP.



** Schließen der Arbeitsmappe
  CALL FUNCTION 'BDC_CLOSE_GROUP'
    EXCEPTIONS
      not_open    = 1
      queue_error = 2
      OTHERS      = 3.
  IF sy-subrc <> 0.
    MESSAGE 'closing batch input session failed' TYPE 'E'.
  ENDIF.

  CLEAR bdcdata[].

  " Ausgabe der Anzahl der verarbeiteten Datensätze
  WRITE: / 'Number of processed records:', lv_count.
  WRITE: / 'Batch input session successfully created.'.


*--------------------------------------------------------------------*
*                              FORMS                                 *
*                              -----                                 *
*--------------------------------------------------------------------*
*&--------------------------------------------------------------------*
*& Form BDC_DYNPRO                                                    *
*&--------------------------------------------------------------------*
*& Hilfsroutine zum Anlegen der Dynprobefehle                         *
*&--------------------------------------------------------------------*
*&  -->  program = Programmanme des Dynpro                            *
*&  -->  dynpro  = Dynpronummer                                       *
*&--------------------------------------------------------------------*
FORM bdc_dynpro USING program dynpro.

  CLEAR ls_bdcdata.
  ls_bdcdata-program  = program.
  ls_bdcdata-dynpro   = dynpro.
  ls_bdcdata-dynbegin = 'X'.
  APPEND ls_bdcdata TO bdcdata.

ENDFORM.                    "bdc_dynpro
*&--------------------------------------------------------------------*
*& Form BDC_FIELD                                                     *
*&--------------------------------------------------------------------*
*& Hilfsroutine zum Anlegen der Dynprobefehle                         *
*&--------------------------------------------------------------------*
*&  -->  fnam = Feldname                                              *
*&  -->  fval = Feldwert                                              *
*&--------------------------------------------------------------------*
FORM bdc_field USING fnam fval.

  CLEAR ls_bdcdata.
  ls_bdcdata-fnam     = fnam.
  ls_bdcdata-fval     = fval.
  APPEND ls_bdcdata TO bdcdata.

ENDFORM.

Here is the recording of my report.



I would really appreciate your help, as I am getting a bit frustrated.

Best regards,
Alex

entry.title: Re: Flexible Workflow activation by Purchase Requisition document type.
entry.content:
Dear, we do checked the  'Scenario based workflow' flag of document type, but don't find the config item like below at all, without this config item, still can't active the flexible workflow.
Our customer's SP version is S4CORE  102, could you help to check if this SP version support the flexible workflow?   If not, which is the minimum version can support?
Many thanks!

entry.title: "Executing a Batch Input Session --> Error: 'LEAVE TO TRANSACTION' is not allowed in Batch Input."
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have the following problem: I created a recording of my report using the SHDB transaction. Based on this, I created a report that, simply put, saves the corresponding records when changes are made (e.g., the description is changed), clicks the back button, and processes the next record that was entered in the selection screen.

Now, the report works quite well, but when the first record is processed and it moves to the next record by clicking the back button, I receive the error: "Error: 'LEAVE TO TRANSACTION' is not allowed in Batch Input." I have tried many things, but nothing has brought the desired success. My goal is to be able to run the report, which creates a batch input session, in the background. Unfortunately, this is currently failing.

Here is the code of my report:

REPORT z_autosave.

TABLES: /opl09/anl_sts, /opl09/fa_vorrat.

CONSTANTS: lc_transaction TYPE tstc-tcode VALUE '/OPL09/INVENTUR'.

DATA: BEGIN OF bdcdata OCCURS 1000.
        INCLUDE STRUCTURE bdcdata.
DATA: END OF bdcdata.
DATA: ls_bdcdata TYPE bdcdata.

SELECT-OPTIONS: s_melnr FOR /opl09/fa_vorrat-melnr,
                s_satza FOR /opl09/fa_vorrat-satza,
                s_datum FOR /opl09/fa_vorrat-datum,
                s_bukrs FOR /opl09/fa_vorrat-bukrs OBLIGATORY,
                s_anln1 FOR /opl09/fa_vorrat-anln1,
                s_anln2 FOR /opl09/fa_vorrat-anln2,
                s_icon FOR /opl09/fa_vorrat-icon OBLIGATORY DEFAULT '@09@',   "@08@ = green, @ = yellow, @0A@ = red
                s_frgsts FOR /opl09/anl_sts-frg_sts OBLIGATORY DEFAULT 'NRE'. "NRE = not relevant (for workflow)

PARAMETERS: p_group TYPE apqi-groupid DEFAULT 'OPAL_AUTO'.




START-OF-SELECTION.

  AUTHORITY-CHECK OBJECT 'F_BKPF_BUK'
    ID 'BUKRS' DUMMY "FIELD p_bukrs    <----- TO BE CHANGED LATER
    ID 'ACTVT' FIELD '01'.
  IF sy-subrc NE 0.
    MESSAGE e112(fg). "WITH p_bukrs.    <----- TO BE CHANGED LATER
  ENDIF.

  SELECT v~melnr, v~anln1, v~anln2 FROM /opl09/fa_vorrat AS v JOIN /opl09/anl_sts AS s
    ON v~melnr = s~melnr
    AND s~frg_step IS INITIAL
    AND s~frg_def IS INITIAL

    WHERE v~melnr IN @s_melnr
    AND v~satza IN @s_satza
    AND v~datum IN @s_datum
    AND v~bukrs IN @s_bukrs
    AND v~anln1 IN @s_anln1
    AND v~anln2 IN @s_anln2
    AND v~icon IN @s_icon
    AND s~frg_sts IN @s_frgsts

    INTO TABLE (lt_items).

  DATA: lv_count TYPE i VALUE 0.


** Öffnen der Arbeitsmappe
  CALL FUNCTION 'BDC_OPEN_GROUP'
    EXPORTING
      client = sy-mandt
      group  = p_group
      user   = sy-uname
      keep   = 'X'.

  LOOP AT lt_items ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs_item>).

    " Zähler erhöhen
    lv_count = lv_count + 1.

    "Choose Process work list on main screen
    PERFORM bdc_dynpro USING '/OPL09/FA_INVENTUR' '1000'.
    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'BDC_OKCODE'
                                     '=ARBVO'.

    " fill selection screen for process work list
    PERFORM bdc_dynpro USING '/OPL09/FA_ANLAGEN_ARBVOR' '1000'.
    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'S_MELNR-LOW'
                                     <fs_item>-melnr.      " Registration number
    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'BDC_OKCODE' '=ONLI'.

    " click on save
    PERFORM bdc_dynpro USING '/OPL09/FA_ANLAGEN_ARBVOR' '0100'.
*    PERFORM bdc_field  USING 'S_ANLN1' <fs_item>-anln1.
*    PERFORM bdc_field  USING 'S_ANLN2' <fs_item>-anln2.
    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'BDC_OKCODE' '=SAVE'.

    " confirm popup
    PERFORM bdc_dynpro USING 'SAPLSPO1' '0500'.
    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'BDC_OKCODE' '=YES'.
    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'BDC_SUBSCR'
                                     'SAPLSPO1                                0501SUBSCREEN'.

*    " Additional pop-up confirmations can be added here
*    " Example for another pop-up
*    PERFORM bdc_dynpro USING 'SAPLSPO1' '0500'.
*    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'BDC_OKCODE' '=YES'.

*    PERFORM bdc_dynpro USING '/OPL09/FA_ANLAGEN_ARBVOR' '0100'.
*    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'BDC_OKCODE'
*                                     '=/EBACK'.







    CALL FUNCTION 'BDC_INSERT'
      EXPORTING
        tcode     = lc_transaction
      TABLES
        dynprotab = bdcdata.

    CLEAR bdcdata[].

  ENDLOOP.



** Schließen der Arbeitsmappe
  CALL FUNCTION 'BDC_CLOSE_GROUP'
    EXCEPTIONS
      not_open    = 1
      queue_error = 2
      OTHERS      = 3.
  IF sy-subrc <> 0.
    MESSAGE 'closing batch input session failed' TYPE 'E'.
  ENDIF.

  CLEAR bdcdata[].

  " Ausgabe der Anzahl der verarbeiteten Datensätze
  WRITE: / 'Number of processed records:', lv_count.
  WRITE: / 'Batch input session successfully created.'.


*--------------------------------------------------------------------*
*                              FORMS                                 *
*                              -----                                 *
*--------------------------------------------------------------------*
*&--------------------------------------------------------------------*
*& Form BDC_DYNPRO                                                    *
*&--------------------------------------------------------------------*
*& Hilfsroutine zum Anlegen der Dynprobefehle                         *
*&--------------------------------------------------------------------*
*&  -->  program = Programmanme des Dynpro                            *
*&  -->  dynpro  = Dynpronummer                                       *
*&--------------------------------------------------------------------*
FORM bdc_dynpro USING program dynpro.

  CLEAR ls_bdcdata.
  ls_bdcdata-program  = program.
  ls_bdcdata-dynpro   = dynpro.
  ls_bdcdata-dynbegin = 'X'.
  APPEND ls_bdcdata TO bdcdata.

ENDFORM.                    "bdc_dynpro
*&--------------------------------------------------------------------*
*& Form BDC_FIELD                                                     *
*&--------------------------------------------------------------------*
*& Hilfsroutine zum Anlegen der Dynprobefehle                         *
*&--------------------------------------------------------------------*
*&  -->  fnam = Feldname                                              *
*&  -->  fval = Feldwert                                              *
*&--------------------------------------------------------------------*
FORM bdc_field USING fnam fval.

  CLEAR ls_bdcdata.
  ls_bdcdata-fnam     = fnam.
  ls_bdcdata-fval     = fval.
  APPEND ls_bdcdata TO bdcdata.

ENDFORM.

 

Here is the recording of my report.



I would really appreciate your help, as I am getting a bit frustrated.

Best regards,
Alex

entry.title: How to check c4c workflow rule activate and deactivate date.
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I have created few workflow rules in C4C tenant, now i want to check activated and deactivated date for particular workflow rule. When particular rule has been activated and deactivated. 

Can i check that in c4c?

 

Thanks & regards,

Dhaval Solanki

Did you get the solution for this .?

entry.title: Re: Create Ticket from Sales Order using QC Button
entry.content: Hi Eduardo, Didi you got the solution for this.?

entry.title: SAP RAP: Edit Button in the List Report
entry.content:
Hello Community,

normally, the Edit button is located in the top right corner of the object page. So you first have to go to the object page and then click the edit button.

Is it also possible to put the Edit button directly in the List Report? 

Like this:

regards,

Lars

entry.title: Re: How to Create And Add Custom Fields to SAP S/4HANA Cloud OData API Entities
entry.content:
I find a bug in this custom field.

First, I maintain this custom field value and save it.

When I refresh this page, It can't be saved in data.

entry.title: Re: Build your app (new UI)?
entry.content:
I have 2 of each in my free tier account

Maybe when creating the build config it marks it as used???

P.S.: Nice improvements being made around Build Apps ... looking for the next big redesign/update 🙂

entry.title: Re: Adobe PDF file generated from Spool opening
entry.content:
Sandra, I can generate it directly, but as there is standard program to generate PDF spool, am using that program. Only thing is, pdf file is generated and stored in the global directory, but the file open error is coming up. This statement,  

call 'RSPO_CACHE_CONTROL'    id 'AREA'        field 'ADSUTIL'
                                                     id 'OP'            field 'READFILE'
                                                     id 'BUFF'        field xbuffer
                                                     id 'BUFLEN'      field buflen
                                                     id 'FILENAME'    field pathname.
                                id 'POSITION'    field read_position
                                id 'READLEN'     field readlen
                                id 'RC'          field crc.

is giving result 'READLEN as 0', which is why I am getting the file open error.  Any resolution for this.

 

Rgds,

G.Khadeer Basha

entry.title: Re: how to disable retrofit transport request in sap
entry.content:
Hello Ravi, 

I am not sure about what you want to achieve, I mean it is you when creating a cycle the one who decides if there is a retrofit systems where the TRs created in maintance dev system should be retrofitted to the project dev system.

If you don´t have a project landscape, n+1 line, then your maintenance cycle does not require that you enter any retrofit system when creating the cycle... 

If you have a cycle with a retrofit system already define you could redefine the system and remove the retrofit system if there are not unretrofit transport requests.

Best regards,

Dolores

entry.title: RACI matrix
entry.content:
Hi all, 

I was wondering if SAP has got a RACI matrix template that follows the SAP Activate methodology? thank you

entry.title: Re: Post negative entries with GRDC
entry.content: [AmountInCompanyCodeCurrency]*-1

entry.title: Re: SAP JCo initializer error
entry.content:
If you have an issue, the first thing to do is always to check if you are using the latest JCo patch level.
Do you use JCo 3.1.10? And do you use SapMachine 17 (64-bit)?

entry.title: Re: scnId not valid in gameboard
entry.content: You need to add the ID "299" at the end and not your name: https://devrel-tools-prod-scn-badges-srv.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/devtoberfestContest/299

entry.title: Re: SAC support for BW Time- and Version-dependent hierarchies
entry.content:
Hi @ranto, 

Sorry for the real late reply. I did not get any notification about your comment. 

Do you still have the mentioned issues?

Best regards, 
Sajoscha

entry.title: Materialsmanagment - Fiori - HTTP 400
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

we've recently upgraded to S4 FPS1. Since the Update we've been getting errors while navigating material managment (MM01/02/03). The error occurs sporadically so i'm having trouble finding the acctual issue.

Error: "A backend error caused an abort of the application, returning: HTTP 400".

We have no Z-programming implemented at this stage that might explain the issue.

Has anyone had a similary issue and can help me find a suloution?

Thanks

entry.title: MRSS V2000 Level 0006 on S/HANA - BAPI_ABSENCE_GETDETAILEDLIST obsolete
entry.content:
Hello together

Our company recently migrated to S4. In ECC we used BAPI_ABSENCE_GETDETAILEDLIST with an custom program to delete absence/availabilities on PA61 before we update with new HR-Data every night. 

Route -> HR-Application->SAP-PA61->MRSS

 

The Problem: BAPI_ABSENCE_GETDETAILEDLIST is obsolete on S4 and we don`t know which BAPI we can use instead to identify the absences/availabilities. 

Help is much appreciated. 

Thanks 

Stepcke

entry.title: Custom field can't be save in table
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

First, I maintain the custom field and save it.

( I already add custom fields and enable all cds views / odata service.)

When I refresh this page, It can't be save in table.

What's the next step I should do to map the custom field in tables?

 

 

When I try to create custom field in other app like 'Supplier Quotation', it can be enable and save.

Best regards,

Eric

entry.title: Re: #COE#BUMA - How to disable SAP system notifications f...
entry.content:
Hi Dave, 

Please find my reply below.

1.Which RPA Tool Are You Using? 

Answer : Power Automate Desktop.

2.How Are the Notifications Delivered? Are the notifications you're receiving pop-up messages within the SAP GUI, email notifications, or something else?

Answer: We are on public cloud, and we are receiving Pop-up messages.

3.When Do These Notifications Occur? Do these notifications appear at specific times or during particular transactions or processes?

Answer: These Notifications are generated from SAP side to provide feedback on the product, so we are not aware about the frequency of the notifications.

4.Have You Tried Any Suppression Methods?Have you attempted any methods to suppress these notifications, such as modifying user parameters or changing system settings?

Answer: No

5.Impact on Processes:How critical is it to suppress these notifications immediately? Is it causing process failures, delays, or data inconsistencies?

Answer: We don't have an option to supress these notifications as these are generated from SAP. Out BOT executes few applications and downloads data to backend. if during download BOT receives one of these notifications then it fails. 

6.Configuration of BOT User.Is the BOT user configured differently from a regular user in terms of authorizations or system settings? or Special configurations might help in fine-tuning system behavior for the BOT.

Answer: Configured same as regular user. 

***Potential Solutions Based on General Use Cases:

  • Suppressing SAP GUI Messages: Answer: We are on public cloud. 
  • Use SAP GUI scripting to capture and dismiss unwanted pop-ups. Answer: We are on public cloud.
  • Running in Background Mode: Answer: Download reports in the background are not suitable for RPA
  • Ensure your BOT processes are scheduled as background jobs, minimizing the chance of encountering interactive prompts. Answer: Download reports in the background are not suitable for RPA

Let me know if you need further information.

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations
entry.content:
1. Preview the App showing all the columns, search and filter options in the CDS view entity.App_preview
  2. Search records based on a specific value from 'Description' field and select an available value from the 'Status' field. search_and_filter

entry.title: Re: Custom CSS for component based UI Integration Cards
entry.content: Can you show the full Request URL? Maybe you can tweak it a bit more so it will work. Your screenshot does not display the most important thing, the end url and app name (or not).

entry.title: Re: DMS: Scan and attach document
entry.content:
Experts,

Can you please let me know the feasibility to directly scan a document from a scanner tray and upload to DMS? 

I understand that if the above approach is not feasible, then I have to ask the users to first scan the file and save it to their desktop. And then as a second step, upload the document from their desktop to DMS. 

Thanks

Bharath

entry.title: Re: Build your app (new UI)?
entry.content:
For others who haven't see it:

  • Here's is the What's New item about new build UI: https://help.sap.com/whats-new/cf0cb2cb149647329b5d02aa96303f56?locale=en-US&Component=SAP%20Build%20Apps%3BSAP%20Build%20Process%20Automation%3BSAP%20Build%20Work%20Zone,%20advanced%20edition%3BSAP%20Build%20Work%20Zone,%20standard%20edition&lastSent=2024-08-22
  • Here's the full Build Service documentation: https://help.sap.com/docs/build-apps/service-guide/build-and-deploy-web-applications?locale=en-US

entry.title: Re: F4 help for custom application job
entry.content:
Hi Michael,

Thanks for the Reply.

Regards,
Bharath

entry.title: How do I maintain 2 hyperlinks in the email templates for SES approval specific to QAS and PROD
entry.content:
Hello SAP community,

We have a requirement to set up mail notifications for the approvers of the SES workflow. The E-mail template should also consists of a hyperlink directing the approver to the 'My inbox application'.

We've set up the template with the hyperlink to the 'My Inbox' app in QAS for testing purpose. The test results are as expected but now we want to move this change to the Production server via "Import/Export software collection".

Our concern is that the transportation will move the same link to the QAS server in production as well. But we want to have two sets of links in QAS and PROD in the mail templates specific to the environment. Can you please recommend the best practice on how to go about doing this?

Thank you.

Best regards,

Rishav.

entry.title: Re: how to inject the clientId/secret to OAuth2UserTokenE...
entry.content: Sorry but your set-up is a bit complex to just understand from screenshots. Is there a reason why your project is split over 2 mta's and 2 xsuaa's? I'd suggest to simplify your approach, so the things work out-of-the-box. You should only have 1 xs-app.json because your project only has a single entry point which is your approuter: this will direct traffic either to /odata (destination) or to /app (ui) or to the login if there is no session. So all 'routes' should be defined in the approuter folder.

entry.title: Real Talk with Claire | Application Development & Automation Track Lead
entry.content:
Hello, SAP Community members 👋 I am Ching Wei (Claire) Tseng, a Product Manager at SAP Build. Originally from Taiwan, I studied at Mannheim University in Germany, earning my master’s degree in 2018 before joining SAP. In my free time, I enjoy cooking Taiwanese, Japanese, and Italian dishes. I’m also an avid traveler and museum enthusiast. 

In the Application Development and Automation (ADA) track of TechEd 2024, you can harness the power of SAP Build—a suite of low-code and pro-code solutions powered by generative AI—to accelerate application development, automation, and business site creation. Explore the latest innovations in ABAP, Build Code, and SAP Build for low-code to extend your ERP system while keeping the core clean!

What inspired you to specialize in this track?

We cover a wide range of topics, including SAP Build Process Automation, SAP Build Apps, SAP Build Work Zone, ABAP, SAPUI5, SAP Build Code, Enterprise Automation with SAP, SAP Mobile Services and more. I’m excited to collaborate with so many outstanding speakers and product managers. Stay tuned, as we will be announcing numerous new features and great news at TechEd!

How does this track embody the ‘where ideas get real’ spirit?

Our exceptional speakers will showcase various practical demos during the lectures, allowing you to learn how to apply our products and solutions in real business scenarios and enhance enterprise performance.

In AD181 jump-start session, you can gain comprehensive knowledge of full-stack development, process automation, and business site creation with SAP Build. In another jump-start session AD180, you’ll learn how to develop transactional SAP Fiori apps in the ABAP Cloud model using the ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model, enhanced by generative AI.

Track stars (sessions to keep on your radar)

  1. AD110 Accelerate development with the latest AI capabilities in SAP Build: Experience the power of Joule copilot in SAP Build solutions to accelerate your development process.
  2. AD104 SAP Build Code: AI development and new service integrations with CAP: Examine new capabilities of SAP Cloud Application Programming Model (CAP) in SAP Build Code, and experience how Joule copilot can speed up your extension development.
  3.  AD105 Enhance your fusion team collaboration with ABAP Cloud and SAP Build: Discover how you can use the graphical modeler in the development environment of SAP Build Code for the ABAP Cloud development model and how your ABAP Cloud projects can be integrated into the lobby of SAP Build solutions.
  4. AD109 Experience the next level of Enterprise Automation with SAP: Explore the latest enhancements using SAP Build solutions, SAP Integration Suite, and SAP Signavio solutions together.
  5. AD103 Extend your SAP solutions with custom mobile apps using SAP Build Code: Learn to transform your user experience with SAP Mobile Services and AI capabilities in SAP Build Code.

Most important of all, you can’t miss out on our intro session: AD100 Unlock SAP Build and ABAP Cloud interoperability to elevate your extensions. Discover a new approach to building extensions while keeping your core clean and learn how SAP Build solutions and the ABAP Cloud development model work together to foster fusion development!

What should be in everyone’s TechEd toolkit for 2024?

  • Laptop, Pad or phone 📱: As TechEd is 100% virtual this year, you can join TechEd easily any place!
  • Curiosity and an Open Mind 💡: TechEd is a great opportunity to learn and explore new technologies, come ready to engage with SAP experts and absorb as much as you can!
  • Agenda 📆: Pre-plan your interested sessions and keynotes to maximize your time.

Don't miss out! Explore the TechEd 2024 session catalog and ensure your favorite ADA track sessions are on your list. We're excited to connect with you at the upcoming TechEd sessions, where you can tap into the full potential of SAP BTP with both pro-code and low-code extensibility options.

entry.title: Re: CL_RSR_REQUEST remove characteristic from axis
entry.content:
Dear sir or madam,

i am trying to use method SET_AXIS_POSITION to add free char. to row, but i don't know how to deal with the parameter i_r_parameter, could you show me how you achieve it? thank you.

BR,

Yue

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to add whole PO items to workflow ?
entry.content:
It is possible, but only with an enhancement. 

Please check: 2171371 - New option to change messages sent out as e-mails - SAP for Me 

2667292 - How to manipulate external mail in MM output - SAP ERP & SAP S/4 HANA - SAP for Me

entry.title: Re: DMS: Scan and attach document
entry.content: Experts, Can you please let me know the feasibility to directly scan a document from a scanner tray and upload to DMS? I understand that if the above approach is not feasible, then I have to ask the users to first scan the file and save it to their desktop. And then as a second step, upload the document from their desktop to DMS. Thanks Bharath

entry.title: Re: Integrate Document Information Extraction into UI5 application
entry.content: @MioYasutake  Hello, I'm triying to use your guide but I'm getting this error when use command `npm run deploy`

entry.title: undefined material in engineering replace with specific material in production
entry.content:
We are on ECC6.0 EHP7. We order sheet metal to cut parts to be welded. In engineering specification technologist request metal plate with 2mm x 1500mm x 6000mm, and metal grade EN 1.4541. Procurement finds plate wich is double sertified for metal grade 1.4541 / 1.4878.

How can i replace material in engineering EN 1.4541 with purchase requisitions plate EN1.4541 / EN 1.4878

I understand in Engineering BOM I will use one material master, but in production BOM I use another material master as it has different characteristics?

I need map process when for product design you have generic components description, while for production it is finalized with specific components adjusted based what is available to purchase. I know that S4 Hana uses preliminary material category in BOM, I read about component substitution for automotive - basically I need some understanding on how to manage material master, where technologies work together with procurement and adjust product component list based on what is available on the market.

entry.title: Re: DMS: Scan and attach document
entry.content: Sorry for posting twice. For some weird reason, SCN screen is jumpy. Tried in Chrome as well as Edge and I see the same. Also, I am unable to delete the redundant comment.

entry.title: Re: SAPUI5 dynamic routes and targets
entry.content: Yes. No updates to share. @andreasecker @jiaweicao

entry.title: CDS --profile hybrid
entry.content:
I have used the cds bind command to hybrid test my application.

When I launch my application with `cds watch --profile hybrid` everything works fine and I connect to the HANA Database. When I try using `cds run --profile hybrid` or `cds serve --profile hybrid` the application still runs but I just connect to a local sqlite.

Has anyone tried using --profile hybrid with run or serve and managed to get it to work?

Any help is appreciated.

entry.content:
Hi kedalenechong,

It is not recommended to delete those files.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

Hi

Did you get any solution on this.

I am finding issues in releasing receipts with same error. All data seems correct but automatic batch is not getting picked for few items.

entry.title: Re: Groovy Script for removing reserved character inside...
entry.content: Thank you. Is there a list of allowed Groovy Import / Java libraries for SAP CPI somewhere ?

entry.title: Re: Important Notice: Changes in SAP Analytics Cloud Classic Stories & Analytic Applications
entry.content:
Hi @Tunir 

you mention that we won´t be able to acces unsupported assets late H2 2025. We need to plan in advance to make sure everything works, especially given that end of year/beggining of year are key dates to use reports and information.

Is there a clearer date, is it October, November...? Any recommendations on when to start migrating?

Thanks!

entry.title: How to obtain my S4HC APIKey
entry.content:
Hi

I started to write this question as I thought I needed the APIKey for a call to this API below.  I am still wanting to know that.

I want to update an element via the API_BUSINESS_PARTNER ... I have set up the comms arrangement sap_com_008 with basic authentication for this test.

According to the API Hub an APIKey is needed - that is in fact not true !!!.🙄 As I can call the API without it and it does the PATCH just fine.  But out of interest How can I get my SAP systems APIKey?🤔

In case you are interested in this part : Here is the API I am calling https://<my sap system>-api.s4hana.ondemand.com:443/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER/A_BusinessPartner('9980000760').     This has in the Authorization tab my communication arrangements userid/password credentials.  The Headers have the CSRF token that I have obtained and it does not care about the APIKey.   The thing does post/patch just fine without it.

 

 

Here are the steps etc I took so far to obtain my APIKey

I have set a clientid/secret for OAUTH calls to S4HC API in our SAP IAS Application for our S4HANA Cloud- Test Tenant (i,e, the S4HC D5X system) and the Client Authentication attribute tab - The ClientID was already there and I have added a Secret.

I then attempt to obtain the APIKey via https://<mysapsystem>-api.s4hana.ondemand.com:443/oauth/token

but I get a 403 - so how can I get my dang APIKey ?

entry.title: Re: Send mail using cl_bcs via SAP distribution list
entry.content:
Hello,
did you search? Answer and example codes can be found in few seconds on the internet.

Try class cl_distributionlist_bcs

entry.title: Re: Inventory Posting List hang even in SAP integration w...
entry.content:
Hi kedalenechong,

My mistake. The correct SAP Note should be 3360703.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: SCORM file size
entry.content: I think even if SF LMS limit is quite gracious, the problem is same as with humans. The more obese the content is, it has side effects. Manually reducing sizes of videos or putting on sub CDN is one way. What I have found effective, is to use a SCORM compressor like https://doctorelearning.com , which can reduce your SCORM size directly. A smaller file size is the best solution.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano 

I recently came across this initiative and I am really interested in learning more about SAP. I have a background in IT.

Kind regards,

Solomon

entry.title: Re: Fiscal year variant mandatory
entry.content:
MM fields are assigned to field selection group and field selection group is assigned to field reference. Different field references can have different options like display , required entry , suppress etc for the same field.

Field references are assigned to material types . .

In your case mandatory and optional may be different material types

Have a look at txn OMS9

entry.title: SAP S4 Hana material availability check in production order
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am facing an issue during material availability check in production orders.

Current config setting

Orders details

Order101038310075921010467101046910104721010480
Comp8000050003800005000380000500038000050003
8000050003		8000050003
Start dt05.06.202402.01.202305.06.202430.01.202423.07.202423.07.2024
end dt06.06.202423.08.202406.06.202429.01.202423.07.202423.07.2024
Req52 501000010100.000 100.000 
Committed qty21212110210

My issue is though material 800050003 has stock of 21, it is not committing any stock for order 1010480. For other orders it is committing full available stock of 21 qty. I tried to change dates in 1010480 order, still same issue.

Looking for your expert opinion.

Thank you.

Regards,

MP

entry.title: Re: Web Client not able to open attachment and attach doc...
entry.content:
Dear SuHsiang 

Please ensure that attachment and pictures paths are configured correctly - follow the steps  7.2.2.1.2  and 7.2.3 of Administrator's Guide for SAP Business One 10.0, version for SAP HANA to set up it and try again.

If the issue will still persists, please check in latest version 10.FP2405

Kind Regards

Nidhi Singh
SAP Business One Support

Looking forward to seeing you on the event day!

Best regards,

Jitan Batra

entry.title: Re: Failed to connect to Northwind Odata v4 via Webi Rich...
entry.content:
Hi @ayman_salem ,

Thanks for the feedback. The issue is still existing and what I've tried so far are:

1 - Use the standalone mode

2 - Change the proxy setting to use system default

3 - Add the rich client to my window defender allow app list

I can access to the Odata link via browser / Excel / Power BI, it seems to be an issue specific to the rich client and I couldn't find any other hints on where to look into. Below is the error log details:

 

FILE_TYPE:DAAA96DE-B0FB-4c6e-AF7B-A445F5BF9BE2
ENCODING:UTF-8
RECORD_SEPARATOR:30
COLUMN_SEPARATOR:124
ESC_CHARACTER:27
COLUMNS:Location|Guid|Time|Tzone|Trace|Log|Importance|Severity|Exception|DeviceName|ProcessID|ThreadID|ThreadName|ScopeTag|MajorTick|MinorTick|MajorDepth|MinorDepth|RootName|RootID|CallerName|CallerID|CalleeName|CalleeID|ActionID|DSRRootContextID|DSRTransaction|DSRConnection|DSRCounter|User|ArchitectComponent|DeveloperComponent|Administrator|Unit|CSNComponent|Text
SEVERITY_MAP: |None| |Success|W|Warning|E|Error|A|Assertion
HEADER_END
|A7F255BFCB3B4F82B5908770C05AC4E30|2024 08 26 14:25:51.185|+0200|Error| |>=|E| |TraceLog|24272|  35|qtp1229202732-35| ||||||||||||||||||||com.businessobjects.rebean.wi.toolbox.impl.services.VisualizationConfigurationServiceImpl||input contained no data
|A7F255BFCB3B4F82B5908770C05AC4E31|2024 08 26 14:26:54.982|+0200|Error| |>=|E| |TraceLog|24272|  30|qtp1229202732-30| ||||||||||||||||||||com.sap.webi.raylight.actions.internal.dhtml.queriespanel.ODataAction||oDataAction : An error occurred during the HTTP call. (IES 10533)
HTTP error code=0
Message=HTTP client error

entry.title: CDS View: Using join of same table twice and call it as association in the primary view
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have a primary CDS view where it has multiple associated CDS views involved (using association).

The main define view starts with one Customer CDS view (for ex: ZBP) that has Business Partner data (BUT000 and associated address data) and call it as left outer join with BUT050-PARTNER1 and BUT050-PARTNER2.

In one of the rules for a particular column as Corporate ID will be fetched based on

BUT050-PARTNER1 (as customer ID and BUT050-PARTNER2 (Group ID data) where BUT050-RELKIND is not initial. 

The above Corporate ID data logic is written as a separate CDS view and call it in the primary as associated view.

Though the above Corporate ID CDS view showing the result based on the validation but when it calls from the primary view. It writes the line of Group ID with the Customer ID where this combination doesn't exist in BUT050 since the RELKIND is initial. 

The business expectation is this line must not be written. 

I need your help, how to write and resolve this solution.

Many thanks for your time here in reading and your valuable answers, if any.

Warm Regards.

entry.title: Re: Change printer for goods issue in MB1A
entry.content:
If you are using old output type and you have maintained condition record then go to MN22 and goto communication and add printer in output device . if you have not maintained then maintain condition record in MN21 

Hope it will help you

 

Regards

Rashid Khan

We also request your support to spread the word about the event with your colleagues (especially the ones based in and around Delhi NCR region)

Best regards,

Jitan Batra

entry.title: Re: Inbound/outbound delivery enquiries
entry.content:
i think quality inspection is based on settings in material master QM tab and inspection set up.

have a look at sap note 874749 and correct the inspection set up if your issue is inspection lot is not created in inbound delivery

entry.content:
hi @Moriaty ,

please refer to SAP Note 2551235

regards,

Maya

entry.title: F110 Proposal workflow.
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We want to create F110 workflow. 1 person creates proposal, mail is sent to another person in sap outbox. Another person will make payment.

I did required configuration but workflow is not getting triggered.

Is there anything i am missing out?

Is there any other thing to be activated?

Please guide.

Regards

Zunaid Hingora

entry.title: error when reading data from sap R/3 for object type purchase order
entry.content:
Hi Experts

 When I run report for CCR with report /SAPAPO/CIF_DELTAREPORT3, the job cancelled with the error "Error when reading data from SAP R/3 for object type Confirmations", "Error when reading data from SAP R/3 for object type purchase requisition" and "Error when reading data from SAP R/3 for object type purchase order". Could you help guide what's the reason and solution?

entry.title: Hear from SAP Champion Amin Omidy How Lifelong Learning Can Unlock Your Career Potential
entry.content:
@Amin_Omidyhas been reading SAP white papers and SAP Community posts for as long as he can remember, covering various areas of interest for the Solution and Enterprise Architect who works as a consultant for clients. “I am always fascinated by the rich information and great answers to different questions related to SAP implementation”, he explains. “I subscribed to different topics to receive notifications via email and actively search for mature SAP answers or related SAP notes to help me with my issues.” 

With more than ten years of experience in SAP solutions for both private and public sectors, Amin certainly knows the pain points of his customers – and how to solve them. “My expertise lies in helping businesses transition to the cloud and establishing modern ERP implementations. This can involve starting an ERP project from scratch or enhancing existing customer solutions, such as migrating on-premise solutions to the cloud or integrating new Software-as-a-Service (SaaS) applications into their IT landscape”, he says. Where else but in the SAP Community could he find answers to such complex issues?  

SAP Learning site helps solve complex problems

Amin: "I am always fascinated by the rich information and great answers the SAP Community provides related to SAP implementation."Well, there’s also the SAP Learning site, Amin admits. “Your website offers a wealth of up-to-date and practical insights, making it an invaluable resource for staying current with the latest SAP developments and best practices.” What he values the most, according to the Canadian resident, is the structured and detailed content helping him solve complex problems and enhancing his understanding of SAP solutions. “My passion to enable businesses to streamline their operations drives me to stay updated with the latest technological advancements”, he concludes.  

However, it’s not only his passion towards his customers that drives Amin to stay at the forefront of innovation. He is convinced: “Living in an era dominated by IT technologies like VMs, microservices, cloud computing, and AI, continuous learning has become essential.” According to Amin, enablement and engagement provided from SAP has significantly enhanced his ability to serve customers better. “Each new piece of knowledge or technique I acquire not only boosts my professional skills but also brings a sense of accomplishment when applied in real-world scenarios.” Watching the positive results and customer satisfaction would confirm the value of lifelong learning and its impact on both his career and personal growth.  

Making impact as SAP Champion

Maybe that’s one of the reasons why Amin also enjoys mentoring young professionals and participating in webinars to share knowledge and learn from others, even outside of work. And why he became an SAP Champion. He simply loves engaging with others, be it his customers or peers in the SAP Community. “Whether through writing blogs, addressing customer issues and potential solutions or serving as a voice for customers within the SAP ecosystem, it allows me to actively contribute and make a meaningful impact”, he recently stated in an interview.  

In return, Amin gets a lot back: “Learning something new through the SAP Community has been incredibly rewarding. The reliability and depth of the information provided are unmatched, ensuring that I can trust the knowledge I gain and apply it directly to my daily work. The opportunity to interact with bloggers or writers to verify any part of the answer or get more related details is particularly valuable. This engagement helps me stay updated with the latest best practices and solutions, enhancing my skills and efficiency in handling SAP-related tasks. The experience is both exciting and encouraging, continually expanding my understanding and capabilities within the SAP ecosystem.” 

Start your own success story today

If you want to stay informed, connected, and up to date with the latest innovations, explore the SAP Community and head over to SAP Learning site to quickly learn a new skill, upskill, and get certified. For access to our guided, premium learning resources, consider a subscription to SAP Learning Hub.

entry.title: Re: Purchase Order Release/Approval Process – My Inbox Fiori App (Workflow and Organizational Plan S
entry.content: what are we going to do if the already approved Purchase Order is still appearing in the user Fiori's inbox? How can we remove numerous Purchase Order with the same issue?

entry.title: FIORI migration to SAPUI5 with BAS
entry.content:
FIORI migration to SAPUI5 with BAS

I am trying to migrate a fiori app to cloud foundry, specifically Purchase requisitions professional which is in this link https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F2229')/S14OP, but looking at the components it needs I realized that the application points to the components of another application which is this one (sap.ui.s2p.mm.lib.reuse.accounting) https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F1643')/S14OP and I was able to launch the application, however right now it asks me for other components that I do not see in the Fiori documentation and I do not know how to obtain them which are these (sap.ui.s2p.mm.lib.reuse.text and sap.ui.s2p.mm.lib.reuse.oci) could someone guide me on how to obtain them so I can download and map them correctly in my ui5.yaml so that the application works correctly?

I appreciate your support in advance

entry.title: SAP Inside Track Gurugram 2024 - Business AI Edition: Call for Speakers
entry.content:
We are thrilled to announce that the speaker registration is now open for SAP Inside Track Gurugram 2024 –

Business AI Edition, taking place on September 14th, 2024.

This year, the event will focus on the transformative power of SAP Business AI, and we are seeking

enthusiastic speakers to present their knowledge and perspectives on a range of AI topics.

If you have experience in building AI applications, creating innovative business AI solutions, or working with

embedded AI in SAP products, we invite you to contribute to our event.

 

Event Details:  

Date: September 14, 2024
Time: 9 AM - 5 PM IST 
Venue: SAP Labs India, Golf Course Rd, Suncity, Sector 54, Gurugram, Haryana 122002, India

Event Registration details: SAP Inside Track Gurugram 2024 - Business AI Edition 

 

Why Speak at SAP Inside Track Gurugram 2024 - Business AI Edition?

 

  • Showcase Your Expertise: Share your knowledge with a passionate and engaged audience of SAP professionals.
  • Network with Peers: Connect with fellow experts, partners, and SAP enthusiasts.
  • Gain Recognition: Enhance your professional profile and gain recognition within the SAP community.

 

Speaker Registration:

Are you ready to share your insights at SAP Inside Track Gurugram 2024 – Business AI Edition? Register now to become a speaker and contribute to one of the most exciting SAP community events of the year.

Speaker Registration Link: SAP Inside Track Gurugram 2024 : Speaker Registration 

Next Steps: Once you submit your proposal,
Step 1: Our expert team will go through your proposal and if it is shortlisted, we will contact your for more details.
Step 2: This will again be discussed internally with the experts and once shortlisted, we will inform you about the next steps – like presentation format, social media advertisement etc.

We look forward to your valuable contributions and to seeing you at SAP Inside Track Gurugram 2024.

Best Regards,
Anuradha Dhingan

entry.title: Re: Custom field can't be save in table

Hi Eric,

Can you refer the document https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/a376cd9ea00d476b96f18dea1247e6a5/621e844403fe4dd5a076438d87156e14.html and check if all the steps have been followed?

Thanks,
Prasanth

entry.title: Error: (GLT2 201) Balancing field "Profit Center " in line item 001 not filled".
entry.content: Hello Experts we are currently testing out the Automatic EBRS process for our customer. However when we are uploading the MT940 we are getting the above error message. can you pelase suggest solution for the same. do we need to default PC or is there a work around?

Hi Prasanth,

I already check all the steps have been followed, and I adapt UI to create it.

 

 

Thanks,

Eric

entry.title: Re: SAP Payroll
entry.content: Try SAP Certified Application Associate - SAP HCM Payroll with ERP 6.0 EHP7 ( C_HCMPAY_67)

entry.title: How to auto reverse Customer Invoice
entry.content: Hello Experts! There is a specific requirement from our customer in Thailand. Process is as below User will book a Proforma Invoice in SAP and Actual Invoice will be posted in SAP at the time of collection. Is there a possible functionality to auto reverse the Proforma Invoice in Public Cloud.

entry.title: Re: Fiscal year variant mandatory
entry.content: Hi Ajit, thanks for the reply. Both the materials have same Material type. Just that they are created for 2 different plants. Please advice.

entry.title: Re: SAP SAC - Publish Private version to Public. Not all data getting copied
entry.content:
@rachugh

Please see the note -  https://me.sap.com/notes/0002584973

entry.title: Minimum required SAP Kernel Patchlevel for SLES 15 (SP 6)
entry.content:
Dear community,

for AIX 7.3 I found a nice list of minimum required SAP Kernel patchlevels in SAP note 1780629. Now I'm looking for something similar for SLES 15 (SP6). I already know the PAM information, but that's quite basic. I know the SAP notes 2369910 and 2578899 as well - but they don't give information about SAP Kernel PLs...

Is there any SAP note or the like which could provide such information for SLES 15 (SP6)?

Thanks & regards, Marie

entry.title: Re: 2001070576 is not in interval that is provided for th...
entry.content:
Hi 

We have a note for this error however it was coming in other reason but it will help you

2167876 - SPED - HUFUNCTIONS 034

Check HU config  in ERP and EWM for packaging material type . Number range should be maintained correctly

Also check master data in ewm 

Check Packaging material type is assigned correctly in Product Master. In Material Master check sale general data and see assigned packaging material type.

 

Regards

Rashid Khan

entry.title: Packaging Specification is not determined after Inbound Delivery is distributed to EWM
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to do an automatic packing for an inbound delivery. However, no HU is created automatically even though I have provided correct details in the Determination tab in transaction SCWM/PACKSPEC (See below screenshots)

Packaging Specification

Condition Type: 0IBD

Level Set: ZPALLET

HU Creation: Ticked

 

Inbound Delivery

HEADER

GR Office: SCU-9902

 

ITEM

Product: 100006

 

Ship-From: Z000000034

 

Next are my configuration for the Packaging Specification Determination

1. SPRO > SCM EWM > EWM > Master Data > Packaging Specification > Maintain Structure of Packaging Specification > Define Level Sets 

 

2. SPRO > SCM EWM > EWM > Master Data > Packaging Specification > Determination of Packaging Specification > Define Access Sequence

Access Seq.: 0IBD

 

3. SPRO > SCM EWM > EWM > Master Data > Packaging Specification > Determination of Packaging Specification > Define Condition Type

Condition Type: 0IBD

Access Seq.: 0IBD

4. SPRO > SCM EWM > EWM > Master Data > Packaging Specification > Determination of Packaging Specification > Define Determination Procedure

Procedure: 0IBD

Condition Type: 0IBD

5. SPRO > SCM EWM > EWM > GR Process > Inbound Delivery > Define Document Type for Inbound Deliveries Process

Document Type: INB

Doc. Category: PDI

Additionally, I tried to pack in Inbound Delivery > Follow-up Function > Pack --- and then by clicking the "Pack Automatically" icon, my material is packed based on what I have maintained in the packaging specification.

What I am expecting is, HUs will be created automatically once Inbound Delivery is distributed to EWM and not by clicking manually  the "Pack Automatically" Icon

Q: Any idea what do I miss?

 

Thanks,

Vince

entry.title: Re: 2001070576 is not in interval that is provided for th...
entry.content:
check which packaging material is used: go to vl02n - packing screen - packaging materials
2. check which packaging material type is assigned to the packaging material: Go to MM03 - Sales:general/plant view - Packaging material data - Packaging mat. type
3. check which external number range interval is assigned to the packaging material type: go to transaction VHAR - select the packaging material type - details
4. check the number range interval: go to transaction SNRO - object: HU_VEKP - display - ranges - intervals
5. he HU number used must be between the lower and the upper limit of the interval defined in step 3

entry.title: Re: Passing UTM parameters from source URL to reporting (custom career site)
entry.content: good question. I´m also interested in this topic...

entry.title: Re: Become a Paid expert for PLATFORM TECHNOLOGIES – Ask an Expert Peer
entry.content:
Is this still working ?

I submitted an application 2 months+ ago. but it is still in review. No timeline can be provided when it can be done as per them.

entry.title: FAGLB03 _Balance Differences with the monthly based balance with the drilldown details
entry.content:
Dear SAP experts,

If unmatched with summary balance by monthly based vs the balances drill down...

What's coming from the difference and how I can find and search the reason? 

The screen shots are in Japanese, I'm sorry not convenient as I don't know by SAP HANA how I can control by English for get your help and I'm very new...

 

In this example, Monthly Based JPY171,943,121 vs The drilldown balanced JPY171,831,879.

The real balanced is same as the drilldown balanced, it means the monthly based balanced missing on SAP.

by The monthly based balance

by The drilldown details net balanced

Best regards,

entry.title: Re: FAGLB03 _Balance Differences with the monthly based balance with the drilldown details
How to edit the interest condition in Interest Rate Instrument using the migration cockpit?
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to migrate an interest rate instrument using the migration cockpit. I have provided the basic data for the interest condition - condition type, condition group, effective from date, due date, etc. - under the 'Structure' tab. I need to manually set the calculation base amount for this condition, but the 'Calculation Base Amount' field is available in the cockpit template in a separate tab - 'Condition'.
I tried to follow the documentation I found, i.e. include the condition in the 'Structure' tab of the migration file - and then add additional information in 'Condition' tab, by adding row with the same 'effective from date' and condition group as in 'Structure' tab.

Documentation : If you want to change further fields for a specific condition type maintained in sheet/table Interest,
please enter the same condition group and condition item effective from date in sheet/table Conditions,
otherwise the system will try to create a new condition.

Unfortunately - when trying to migrate I receive following error: “One condition already exists with this ‘effective from’”.

Could you please point out how I can make the cockpit interpret the condition from the 'Structure' tab and the 'Condition' tab as one? What should actually be in both of these tabs for SAP to consider them complimentary and not throw the above error?

Great thanks for your assistance.

entry.title: Purchasing Rebate Processing (2R7) for multiple company codes
entry.content:
Dear all,

in our scenario, we have one supplier who delivers to multiple company codes of our group. 

With this supplier, we have a bonus agreement based on the total annual spend of all company codes.

Business volume determination for the whole group is easy with CCM but I need as well a settlement document for each buying company code. The standard behavior is that I get only one settlement document for the contract issuing company code.

If you have such a scenario, how have you solved this?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Attachment Limit for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Apps
entry.content: Dear Enda, have you figured out any totall document memory limitation in Sap Public Cloud?

entry.title: Re: RAP-Create option: Can all fields including key can b...
entry.content:
Hi,

If you mean something like https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/#/topic/ceb9284b16f64f30865ce999dbd56064 in the SAP Fiori elements for OData V4, this is in the pipeline and must be available pretty soon! Currently though this is not possible.

Best Regards,

    Sandeep

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations
entry.content:
PFB Task 3 submission:

Thankyou @Shilpa_Shankar  for your time and valuable inputs.

  1. Preview the App showing all the columns, search and filter options in the CDS view entity.
  2. Search records based on a specific value from 'Description' field and select an available value from the 'Status' field.

entry.title: Re: Customizing OB58 in production without transport request
entry.content: It's a common requirement from business users. You can just change the status of the message FE 146 from "E" to "-" in transaction OBA5 in DEV system, then transport the Transport request to Production system.

entry.title: Re: ASSET ACCOUNTING - DEPRECIATION
entry.content:
Kindly review the SAP community page below, which mentions asset account depreciation.
SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance-Asset Acc... - SAP Community

entry.title: Re: Packaging Specification is not determined after Inbou...
entry.content:
Hi 

Please check the blog and your config. It will help you to check it 

https://community.sap.com/t5/supply-chain-management-blogs-by-members/packaging-specification-in-embedded-ewm/ba-p/13426548

 

Regards

Rashid Khan

entry.title: E-Invoice Malaysia: Cancelled invoice in LHDN portal.
entry.content:
Hi,

In regards to getting the updated status in EDOC_COCKPIT, I want to know if an invoice is cancelled in the LHDN portal, can we get the status updated in the cockpit. 

So far, I do not see this happening even though technically speaking it could be a possibility with "Get Status" functionality.

Any answers or insights on this are appreciated.

entry.title: Re: Stock upload with existing handling Units
entry.content:
Generally 

This error comes when we have a problem with number range. check external number ranges 

 

Regards

Rashid Khan

entry.title: Re: Enabling your workforce for the future with the new integrated learning experience
entry.content:
Hi Jenn, 

No, you cannot opt out from the new experience in 2H 2024 anymore. You can stay on the legacy experience and display the switch, or move to the new experience (and remove the switch if you choose). 

Kind regards,

entry.title: Re: Error while logging on to the service instance using this project.
entry.content:
Hi Bharath,

have you tried to delete the project (right-click on the project -> Delete) in Eclipse and recreate it?

The error message could imply that it was created for a different ABAP Trial User (maybe your Trial Account expired in between and you created a new one).

Deleting the project and creating a new one for your ABAP Trial service instance should do the trick.

Best Regards,

Thomas

entry.title: Re: Inspection lot number range status doesn't change
entry.content: In our system the buffer in SNRO is set to 50 (object QLOSE). In order to see your change in number ranges you would have to create a maximum of 50 lots in that case in order to see your change appear. (depending on how far the numbers in the buffer have been handed out). Be aware that the buffer is handing out per SAP server. If you are running separate instances as backup servers that are kept in sync, there might be several buckets of 50 numbers handed out (1 bucket per server). This is also why you sometimes see gaps in number ranges that are filled somewhat later.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud 中树形 Custom Widget 开发实践和经验分享
entry.content: 赞！辛苦分享
